title: coleus habrophyllus
intro: Coleus habrophyllus is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the coleus. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Coleus habrophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
